title: The Ellison Family’s $49 Billion Ask Is an Acid Test for Markets
title_cn: 埃里森家族 490 亿美元的要价是对市场的严峻考验
summary: Bankers are preparing to sell a jumbo debt package to support the $110 billion acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. It’s a risky deal and comes at a moment when the bond markets have been wobbling. Even with the backing of the billionaire Ellison family, this will be a major test of debt investors’ willingness to support megamergers.

title: Oil Investments to Drop for Third Year on War Shock, IEA Says
title_cn: IEA表示，由于战争冲击，石油投资将连续第三年下降
summary: Global investments in oil projects are due to fall for the third year in a row, as the supply shock from the Middle East conflict shifts priorities to new trade routes and other energy sources.

title: Treasuries Resume Decline as US Strikes Push Oil Prices Higher
title_cn: 美国罢工推高油价，国债恢复下跌
summary: Benchmark Treasuries retreated for the first session in six as fresh US strikes in the Persian Gulf spurred a rally in oil prices and fueled concern over faster inflation.

title: Oil Spikes as Renewed Gulf Attacks Threaten Fragile Ceasefire
title_cn: 海湾再次袭击威胁脆弱的停火，石油价格飙升
summary: Oil spiked after renewed attacks in the Persian Gulf and a fresh attempt by Washington to raise the pressure on Tehran with sanctions, as the US and Iran remained far apart on moves to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Industrial Metals Decline as Gulf Strikes Dampen Deal Optimism
title_cn: 海湾罢工削弱交易乐观情绪，工业金属下跌
summary: Copper extended losses alongside other industrial metals after the US carried out fresh strikes in the Persian Gulf and a deal to end the war with Iran remained elusive.

title: Oasis Says Japan Proposal on Shareholders Hurts Retail Investors
title_cn: 绿洲称日本股东提案伤害散户投资者
summary: Japan’s plan to tighten the threshold for shareholder proposals would hurt retail investors while having little impact on institutional activist investors, said Seth Fischer, the founder of Oasis Management Co.

title: Chinese Coal Disaster to Ripple Through Steel, Power, Chemicals
title_cn: 中国煤灾波及钢铁、电力、化工
summary: The Shanxi coal disaster is likely to hit Chinese output in the short term, raising costs for steelmakers, power plants and chemicals manufacturers.

title: Palm Oil Titan Wilmar Dives Most in Six Years on Indonesia Probe
title_cn: 棕榈油巨头丰益国际因印度尼西亚调查而出现六年来最大跌幅

title: Nomura Analyst Says Near-Term BOJ Hike Still Up in Air on Iran
title_cn: 野村证券分析师表示，日本央行近期加息对伊朗问题仍悬而未决
summary: Market indicators suggest that traders are nearly convinced that the Bank of Japan will raise interest rates in June or July, but a Nomura group analyst isn’t so sure.

summary: China is selling as much as 6 billion yuan ($885 million) of green sovereign bonds in Hong Kong on Thursday, returning to the international ESG debt market a year after its debut in London.

title: China’s Declining Appetite for Oil Laid Bare by Iran War
title_cn: 伊朗战争暴露了中国石油需求下降
summary: Chinese imports of crude oil are set to drop to levels not seen since the pandemic, as the war in Iran reveals the extent to which demand has disappeared and may not be coming back.

title: Google Engineer Charged With Insider Trading on Polymarket
title_cn: 谷歌工程师被指控在 Polymarket 进行内幕交易
summary: A Google software engineer was charged with insider trading on Polymarket, where he allegedly made more than $1 million betting on one of last year’s most popular Internet searches.

title: War Stress Pushes Indonesia, Thailand to Lean on Short-Term Debt
title_cn: 战争压力迫使印尼和泰国依赖短期债务
summary: Southeast Asia’s two biggest economies are selling more short-term debt to cope with the stress from the US-Iran war, draining liquidity from broader markets.

title: Synopsys Settles with Elliott, Names Firm’s Jesse Cohn to Board
title_cn: Synopsys 与 Elliott 达成和解，任命该公司的 Jesse Cohn 为董事会成员
summary: Synopsys Inc. said it has reached an agreement with Elliott Investment Management and is appointing the activist investor’s Jesse Cohn to the chip-design software maker’s board.

title: PacSun 'Co-Creating' Brand to Reach Gen Z
title_cn: PacSun“共同创造”品牌以吸引 Z 世代
summary: PacSun CEO Brieane Olson said that the retailer has built a resurgence by 'co-creating' and listening to a live feedback loop of what Gen Z consumers want to see from the retailer instead of treating young people like a static audience. She said brands have to shit the notion of control and relinquish it some to gain more 'brand and community trust.' (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stock Rally Falters on Conflicting US-Iran Signals: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美伊信号相互冲突，股市涨势动摇：市场休整
summary: Wall Street traders left stocks wavering amid mixed signals about prospects for a deal to end the war in Iran and revive energy flows through the vital Strait of Hormuz.

title_cn: 交易员认为伊朗关于美伊协议的信号相互矛盾
summary: Eric Weiner, Bloomberg News senior editor for equities Americas and Sarah Hunt, chief market strategist at Alpine Saxon Woods, break down muted market reaction to Iran peace negotiations as oil remains high with the future of MidEast shipping lanes uncertain.  (Source: Bloomberg)

JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon says, “there might be, in the next couple years, a chance to put $10 billion to $20 billion to work buying something,” adding that JPMorgan is “on the lookout” for a deal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Bonds’ Return to Pre-War Calm Fuels Bets It’ll Be Short-Lived

summary: The return of calm to the US bond market following turbulence stirred up by the Iran war is attracting big moves in options, with some traders wagering it won’t last.

title: The World Cup Is a Petri Dish

summary: Millions of international visitors are coming to North America for the competition, and the odds are that quite a few will be unwell.

summary: These companies are building solutions in environments where infrastructure or systems have failed to deliver.

title: Taiwan Said to Suspect Nvidia Chips Smuggled to China Via Japan

summary: Taiwan prosecutors suspect that three individuals successfully smuggled at least one shipment of Nvidia Corp. AI chips to China after first exporting them to Japan, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Mizuho Financial Group CEO on BOJ Outlook
title_cn: 瑞穗金融集团首席执行官谈日本央行展望
summary:
Masahiro Kihara, President & Group CEO at Mizuho Financial Group, expects the BOJ to raise rates in June or July. He also discusses the outlook for business as the bank forecasts another year of profit growth.
He speaks with Shery Ahn on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade".  (Correction: The CEO said Japan’s latest core-core CPI was 2.3%. Latest figures from April 2026 show it was 1.9%.)
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Korea’s Hanwha Offers Rockets in Bid for Canada Submarine Deal
title_cn: 韩国韩华公司提供火箭来竞标加拿大潜艇交易
summary: As Canada prepares to award a rich contract to build as many as 12 submarines, Hanwha Corp. of South Korea is sweetening its bid by offering to help in another realm: space.

title: UBS AM’s Khan on EM, APAC Bond Markets
title_cn: 瑞银资产管理 (UBS AM) 的 Khan 谈新兴市场和亚太债券市场
summary: Shamaila Khan, Head of Global Emerging Markets and Asia Pacific Fixed Income at UBS Asset Management, discusses the outlook for markets and investment strategy. She speaks with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts from the sidelines of the UBS Asian Investment Conference in Hong Kong. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Chip Giant CXMT’s IPO Revives Memories of Past Market Tops
title_cn: 中国芯片巨头长鑫存储IPO重温昔日市场巅峰
summary: The buzz surrounding ChangXin Memory Technologies Ltd.’s anticipated IPO is also triggering anxiety in parts of China’s market, where investors recall earlier mega-deals that absorbed vast amounts of liquidity and marked turning points for equities.

title: AI Boom Fuels Record $14.5 Billion in Taiwan Tech Firm Borrowing
title_cn: 人工智能热潮推动台湾科技公司借贷创纪录的 145 亿美元
summary: Taiwanese tech firms have completed a record $14.5 billion of debt deals so far this year, as they race to secure financing to meet soaring demand for artificial intelligence capacity.

title: World’s Appetite for AI Makes China Less Afraid of Stronger Yuan
title_cn: 世界对人工智能的需求让中国不再害怕人民币走强
summary: The global AI investment boom is powering a new wave of Chinese exports and making Beijing more comfortable with a stronger yuan.

title: Swiggy CEO Vows to Stay Out of Amazon-Walmart India Spending War
title_cn: Swiggy 首席执行官发誓不会卷入亚马逊与沃尔玛印度的支出战争
summary: Swiggy Ltd., one of India’s top quick commerce firms, plans to restrain spending and focus on profitability while deeper-pocketed rivals Flipkart and Amazon.com Inc. intensify efforts to shrink delivery times and expand discounts.

title: HP Gives Profit Outlook That Fails to Ease Chip Cost Concern
title_cn: 惠普公布的利润展望未能缓解芯片成本担忧
summary: HP Inc. gave a profit forecast for the current quarter that signaled the company continues to contend with a dramatic increase in memory chip prices.

title: Stocks Halt Rally on Conflicting US-Iran Signals | The Close 5/27/2026
title_cn: 美伊信号冲突导致股市停止上涨收盘价 2026 年 5 月 27 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are BlackRock’s Jeffrey Rosenberg, State Street Investment Management’s Aakash Doshi, Wells Fargo’s Michael Turrin, Former Boston Federal Reserve President Eric Rosengren, Wilmington Trust & M&T Bank CIO Tony Roth, D.A. Davidson Technology Research Head Gil Luria, Constellation Research CEO Ray Wang, M12 Managing Partner Cheryl Cheng, & Kikoff CEO & Founder Cynthia Chen on Consumer Spending Trends. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Salesforce Taking Longer Than Expected to Shift to AI, Analyst Luria Says
title_cn: 分析师 Luria 表示，Salesforce 向人工智能转型的时间比预期要长
summary: The shift to AI for Salesforce is taking longer than expected, according to Gil Luria of D.A. Davidson Technology Research. He reacts to earnings from Salesforce and Snowflake on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dell Wins $9.7 Billion Defense Deal to Streamline Software Buys
title_cn: 戴尔赢得 97 亿美元的国防交易以简化软件采购
summary: A unit of Dell Technologies Inc. won a $9.7 billion contract to help the US military handle its licenses for Microsoft Corp. software related to email, spreadsheets and other needs across classified and unclassified systems, the Pentagon said.

title: Marvell Boosts Annual Forecast, Citing AI-Fueled Demand
title_cn: Marvell 因人工智能推动的需求而上调年度预测
summary: Marvell Technology Inc. delivered a quarterly forecast that exceeded analysts’ estimates and boosted its outlook for the year, citing demand for chips used in AI data centers.

title: Salesforce Gives Lukewarm Outlook That Fuels Disruption Fear
title_cn: Salesforce 的前景不温不火，加剧了对颠覆的恐惧
summary: Salesforce Inc. gave a revenue outlook for the current period that fell just short of analysts’ estimates, unnerving investors already concerned about the possibility that artificial intelligence will disrupt the software business.

title: Memory Chip Frenzy Sends SK Hynix, Micron Into $1 Trillion Club
title_cn: 存储芯片狂潮让 SK 海力士、美光进入 1 万亿美元俱乐部
summary: Bloomberg News semiconductors reporter Ian King said that investors believe that the chip frenzy that has spurred korean companies SK Hynix and Micron into the the $1 trillion market cap club is not going to end anytime soon, despite history warning differently. King said that despite common wisdom saying the surge must end, there is 'a groundswell of opinion' from companies that this situation could be different (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Snowflake Jumps 30% on Sales Outlook, $6 Billion Amazon Deal
title_cn: Snowflake 销售额增长 30%，与亚马逊达成 60 亿美元交易
summary: Snowflake Inc. shares jumped almost 30% in late trading after the software maker gave a stronger-than-expected annual outlook and signed a $6 billion multiyear agreement to use Amazon.com Inc.’s cloud services and chips.

title: Temu-Owner PDD Slides Most in a Year After Sales Miss Estimates
title_cn: Temu-Owner PDD 销量未达预期，一年来跌幅最大
summary: PDD Holding Inc.’s shares suffered their worst drop in a year after the company’s first-quarter revenue missed expectations in part due to fierce domestic competition and weak consumer sentiment in China.

title: How NASA Plans to Build a Base on the Moon
title_cn: 美国宇航局计划如何在月球上建立基地
summary: NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman is laying out the ground work for building a new base on the moon. He says it will be done in phases, and infrastructure will be waiting for the astronauts who land there in 2028. He speaks on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed’s Cook Prepared to Raise Rates If Inflation Lingers
title_cn: 如果通胀持续存在，美联储库克准备加息
summary: Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook said inflation is headed in the wrong direction and she would be prepared to raise interest rates if that persists.

title: Uber Buys Aspex Stake in Delivery Hero After Takeover Offer
title_cn: Uber 收购 Delivery Hero 后 Aspex 股份
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. bought out Aspex Management’s shares of Delivery Hero SE, boosting its stake to 36.83% as the ride-hailing company negotiates a deal to buy the German food-delivery platform.

title: Three Charts Capturing Micron’s Record Rise to $1 Trillion
title_cn: 三张图表记录了美光科技创纪录的 1 万亿美元涨幅
summary: Micron Technology Inc.’s incredible rally this year has launched the memory-chip firm into an elite group of stocks worth at least $1 trillion, setting at least one record along the way.

title: Real Estate Investment Committee: AI, Rates, Supply & Demand

summary: Bess Freedman, CEO of Brown Harris Stevens, Annette Kroeger, CEO of North & Central Europe at PIMCO, and Liz Hart, president of leasing for North America at Newmark join Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Salesforce Earnings Can Put AI Fears to Bed, Give Stock a Lift
title_cn: Salesforce 的盈利可以消除对人工智能的恐惧，提振股价
summary: While software stocks rebound from the artificial intelligence-driven wipeout earlier this year, Salesforce Inc. hasn’t really benefited. But its earnings after the close Wednesday could pull the company’s shares out of their malaise.

title: Meta to Sell AI Chatbot Subscriptions to Offset Spending
title_cn: Meta 出售人工智能聊天机器人订阅以抵消支出
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. is selling consumer subscriptions to its Meta AI chatbot for the first time, a key step toward building a business that would help offset hundreds of billions of dollars in artificial intelligence investments by the company.

title: Valve Raises Steam Deck Pricing By Up to $300 Amid Chip Shortage
title_cn: 由于芯片短缺，Valve 将 Steam Deck 定价提高了 300 美元
summary: Valve Corp. increased the prices of its Steam Deck handheld gaming devices more than 40%, the latest example of an industrywide memory and storage chip crunch that has driven up prices of many consumer gadgets.

title: Chile’s Atacama Desert Is Becoming Sweet Spot for Energy Storage
title_cn: 智利的阿塔卡马沙漠正在成为储能的最佳地点
summary: The Atacama desert in northern Chile is emerging as a magnet for investment in energy storage that allows vast solar plants to extend supply after sundown.

title: SK Hynix, Micron Join $1 Trillion Market Cap Club | Bloomberg Tech 5/27/2026
title_cn: SK 海力士、美光加入 1 万亿美元市值俱乐部 |彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 27 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss Micron and SK Hynix joining the $1 trillion market cap club and seeing continued momentum. Plus, Taiwanese prosecutors suspect three individuals of smuggling Nvidia chips to China through Japan. And, XPRIZE founder and early SpaceX investor Peter Diamandis joins to discuss SpaceX's IPO as the company celebrates a major Starship milestone. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CFTC Moves to Undo Settlement That Had Gemini Paying $5 Million
title_cn: CFTC 撤销 Gemini 支付 500 万美元的和解协议
summary: The US Commodity Futures Trading Commission and Gemini Trust Co., led by the billionaire Winklevoss brothers, want to dissolve a 2025 settlement that resulted in the cryptocurrency exchange agreeing to pay $5 million to end an agency lawsuit.

title: US Strikes Iran Targets Near Hormuz With No Accord in Sight
title_cn: 美国袭击霍尔木兹附近的伊朗目标，但没有达成任何协议
summary: The US carried out airstrikes on an Iranian military site and imposed new sanctions to prevent Tehran from profiting from vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz, highlighting the fragility of recent diplomatic momentum.

title: Japan Plans ‘Bridging Bonds’ to Fund Investment Initiatives
title_cn: 日本计划发行“过渡债券”为投资计划提供资金
summary: Japan plans to use so-called bridging bonds to help finance Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi’s investment plans, the government’s top spokesperson said, a development that comes as investors are already concerned about more debt issuance.

title: Singapore Top Envoy Meets Kim Jong Un’s Close Aide on Rare Trip
title_cn: 新加坡高级特使罕见访问金正恩亲密助手
summary: Singapore’s foreign minister held talks with a top aide to North Korean leader Kim Jong Un in a rare visit to Pyongyang, urging the isolated state to keep channels for dialogue open with the outside world.

title: China Says It Drove Off Dutch Warship Sailing in South China Sea
title_cn: 中国称其击退了在南海航行的荷兰军舰
summary: China said it expelled a Dutch warship that entered its waters, a rare incident between the two navies that underscores tensions over contested boundaries in the South China Sea.

title: Trump’s Bind Deepens With Hormuz Shut and Hawks Pushing War
title_cn: 随着霍尔木兹海峡关闭和鹰派推动战争，特朗普的束缚加深
summary: As President Donald Trump continues to suggest a deal with Iran is close, he finds himself caught between two extremes: Tehran’s demand for financial relief and an end to attacks, and pressure from Republican hawks to “finish the job” — or at least not to sign a bad deal.

title: US Strikes Iran Targets as Trump Vows to ‘Watch Over’ Hormuz
title_cn: 特朗普发誓“看守”霍尔木兹，美国袭击伊朗目标
summary: President Donald Trump asserted that no one nation would control the vital Strait of Hormuz waterway, highlighting a key sticking point in resolving the war with Iran.

title: Trump: 'Not Satisfied Yet' on Iran Deal | Balance of Power: Late Edition 5/27/2026
title_cn: 特朗普：对伊朗协议“尚未满意”权力平衡：最新版 2026 年 5 月 27 日
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Dana Stroul, The Washington Institute for Near East Policy Research Director, discusses President Trump denying an Iranian report on a drafted deal to re-open the Strait of Hormuz, Jessica Taylor, Cook Political Report US Senate and Governors Editor, talks about the Texas Republican primary race where Attorney General Ken Paxton defeated incumbent Senator John Cornyn, and Representative Joe Morelle (D-NY), Ranking Member of the House Administration Committee and Vice Ranking Member of the House Appropriations Committee, says New York Democrats are considering two constitutional redistricting options in response to GOP-led map changes in states like Texas. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Denies Iran Report on Draft Deal to Re-Open Hormuz
title_cn: 美国否认伊朗关于重新开放霍尔木兹海峡协议草案的报告
summary: Dana Stroul, The Washington Institute for Near East Policy Research Director, discusses the Trump Administration denying an Iranian report on a drafted deal to re-open the Strait of Hormuz. Stroul also says other countries are losing faith in the US and are making their own deals with Iran to transit the Strait of Hormuz. She speaks with Kailey Leinz on Bloomberg's Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Takaichi to Meet Philippines’ Marcos to Deepen Security Ties
title_cn: 高市将与菲律宾马科斯会面以深化安全关系
summary: Philippine President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. is set to meet Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi on Thursday in Tokyo, as shared concerns over an increasingly assertive China accelerate a deepening of security ties between the two Asian nations.

title: Trump Disputes Iran’s Hormuz Control
title_cn: 特朗普质疑伊朗对霍尔木兹的控制
summary: President Donald Trump asserted that no one nation would control the vital Strait of Hormuz waterway, highlighting a key sticking point in resolving the war with Iran. Bloomberg's Romy Varghese breaks down the latest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. Morelle: Democrats Will ‘Finish’ Redistricting Fight
title_cn: 众议员莫雷尔：民主党将“完成”选区重新划分斗争
summary: Representative Joe Morelle (D-NY), Ranking Member of the House Administration Committee and Vice Ranking Member of the House Appropriations Committee, says New York Democrats are considering two constitutional redistricting options in response to GOP-led map changes in states like Texas, confirming an earlier report from POLITICO. He says the Iran war is worsening affordability pressures through higher gas, food and goods prices, and criticizes the Defense Department for failing to provide Congress with a detailed cost estimate or supplemental funding request. Rep. Morelle also rejects a proposed anti-weaponization fund tied to ICE and CBP funding, calling it "a massive slap in the face to the American people." He speaks with Kailey Leinz on Bloomberg's Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ex-President Biden Sues to Stop DOJ Sharing Interview Tapes
title_cn: 前总统拜登起诉阻止司法部分享采访录音
summary: Former President Joe Biden is suing the US Justice Department to block officials from sharing audio recordings and interview transcripts he gave for a memoir project with Republicans in Congress and a conservative advocacy group.

title: Paxton, Talarico to Battle for US Senate Seat
title_cn: 帕克斯顿、塔拉里科将争夺美国参议院席位
summary: Jessica Taylor, Cook Political Report US Senate and Governors Editor, talks about the Texas Republican primary race where Attorney General Ken Paxton defeated incumbent Senator John Cornyn, and how it sets up a midterm election between Paxton and Democratic state representative James Talarico. She speaks with Kailey Leinz on Bloomberg's Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Marcos’ Sister Flags Support for Duterte Ahead of Senate Trial
title_cn: 马科斯的姐妹在参议院审判前支持杜特尔特
summary: Senators seeking to lock impeached Philippine Vice President Sara Duterte out of politics for good may face an uphill battle with one of her staunchest supporters calling the movement against her family “insane and wicked.”

title: New York Lawmakers Approve Second-Home Tax in State Budget
title_cn: 纽约立法者批准州预算中的第二套房税
summary: New York lawmakers approved a revenue package for the state budget that includes a new surcharge on pricey second homes in the city, but omits a proposal to tax all-cash property purchases.

title: How Does DOJ’s $1.8 Billion Anti-Weaponization Fund Work?
title_cn: 司法部 18 亿美元的反武器化基金如何运作？
summary: On today’s Big Take podcast: Understanding the Justice Department’s controversial plan to establish a $1.776 billion legal fund.

title: Unpacking Trump’s “Anti-Weaponization Fund”
title_cn: 解读特朗普的“反武器化基金”
summary: On today’s Big Take podcast, host Sarah Holder and Bloomberg reporters Chris Strohm and Erik Wasson track the bipartisan backlash to the Justice Department’s $1.776 billion Anti-Weaponization Fund which some lawmakers have called a slush fund for Trump loyalists. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mullin Defends Migrant Jail Where NJ Senator Was Pepper-Sprayed
title_cn: 穆林为新泽西州参议员被胡椒喷雾的移民监狱辩护
summary: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin defended conditions at a migrant detention center in New Jersey that was the scene of weekend protests in which two people were arrested and US Senator Andy Kim was hit with a cloud of pepper spray.

title: Traders Weigh Iran Peace Deal Reports as Trump Pushes Back | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 5/27/2026
title_cn: 特朗普的反击令交易商权衡伊朗和平协议报告彭博商业周刊日报 5/27/2026
summary: Today, Bloomberg Washington correspondent Tyler Kendall live from the White House after Trump's lengthy Cabinet meeting. Then, Eric Weiner, Bloomberg News senior editor for equities Americas and Sarah Hunt, chief market strategist at Alpine Saxon Woods, break down muted market reaction to Iran and the optimism around tech earnings as chip stock continue to rally. Plus, Bloomberg Economics' senior geoeconomics analyst Adam Farrar talks the latest  from the MidEast as the White House pushes back on Iran's messaging around a potential deal. Finally, Joe Lovinger, Bloomberg News Texas reporter, breaks down the results in the republican runoff for the Lonestar state's senate seat, as Trump's favored candidate Ken Paxton handily beat incumbent John Cornyn. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Texas Buckles Up for a Frantic Senate Race to November
title_cn: 得克萨斯州为十一月的激烈参议院竞选做好准备
summary: The duel between Republican Ken Paxton and Democrat James Talarico is already getting ugly

title: Macron Says Norway Agrees to Work Closely on Nuclear Deterrence
title_cn: 马克龙表示挪威同意在核威慑方面密切合作
summary: French President Emmanuel Macron said late Wednesday that Norway agreed to work closer together on nuclear deterrence.

title: Fuel-Starved Cuba Dealt Blow as Russian Tanker Changes Course
title_cn: 俄罗斯油轮改变航线，燃料匮乏的古巴受到打击
summary: A Russian tanker carrying over 240,000 barrels of diesel has abandoned its voyage to Cuba and is now sailing southeast after weeks of uncertainty surrounding a shipment meant to help relieve the fuel-starved island’s worsening energy crisis.

title: Trump Accounts App Will Be Available Thursday, Bessent Says
title_cn: 贝森特表示，特朗普账户应用程序将于周四推出
summary: An app allowing parents to manage Trump Accounts for their children will be available Thursday, ahead of the program’s July 4 launch, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said Wednesday at the White House.

title: $600,000 in Two Hours: Texas Set to Become a Midterm Money Pit
title_cn: 两小时内赚到 60 万美元：德克萨斯州将成为中期选举的坑
summary: As Donald Trump celebrated Ken Paxton’s landslide win in Texas, Republican officials were busy gearing up for a brutal fight that may end up costing them more than $100 million to stop a Democrat from flipping a seat in a state the president won by 14 percentage points.

title: Trump Disputes Iran’s Hormuz Control | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/27/2026
title_cn: 特朗普质疑伊朗对霍尔木兹的控制权力平衡：早期版本 2026 年 5 月 27 日
summary:
On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington
Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss President Donald
Trump's cabinet meeting at the White House. On today's show, Cohen Group
Senior Adviser Jen Gavito, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting
Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino and American Airlines CEO Robert
Isom. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: American Airlines CEO Sees 2025 Level Profits for 2026
title_cn: 美国航空首席执行官预计 2026 年利润将达到 2025 年水平
summary: American Airlines CEO Robert Isom discusses consumer demand amid the war in Iran, new offerings for customers, where he sees opportunities for growth, and how the company is set up to deal with higher fuel costs. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Strategic Victory in Iran Could Prove 'Elusive', says Gavito
title_cn: 加维托表示，伊朗的战略胜利可能“难以捉摸”
summary: Senior Advisor with the Cohen Group Jen Gavito said President Trump has repeatedly threatened more military action against Iran, but the fact that it hasn't happened yet is recognition that the conflict isn't going to be won militarily (Source: Bloomberg)
